creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to Richard Gallamore from comment #5)
Sure. The old Makefile didn't work at all, so in order to make it work:

- I removed the post-patch lines. They are already present in the Makefile of Alpine.
- Created a new pkg-plist with "make makeplist" and this resulted in the new pkg-plist.
- Removed the PICO_ALPINE_SLAVE=yes line because the references in the Makefile of Alpine are removed too. Left the ".include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile" line because of pico being the slave port of Alpine.
